import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "orderId": string;
  "customer": string;
  "email": string;
  "items": number;
  "total": number;
  "status": string;
  "placedAt": string;
  "shipTo": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Orders (Pinned)",
  "description": "ID stays on the start edge, Actions stay on the end edge while you scroll horizontally.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": false,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "enablePinnedColumns": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "orderId",
      "label": "Order #",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "pinned": "start",
      "width": 120
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "customer",
      "label": "Customer",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 220
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "items",
      "label": "Items",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "width": 100
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "total",
      "label": "Total",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "width": 130
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 130,
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Paid": "default",
        "Pending": "secondary",
        "Refunded": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "placedAt",
      "label": "Placed",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 140
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "shipTo",
      "label": "Ship To",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c9",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "pinned": "end",
      "width": 70
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
